gates.name: Phase 1 Completion Gate
gates.description: Confirms SQLite durability layer is fully operational before sink connections are attempted

criteria.name: sink_outbox receiving records
criteria.sql_test: SELECT count(*) FROM sink_outbox WHERE created_at > datetime('now','-5 minutes')

criteria.name: No SQLITE_BUSY errors in last 30 minutes
criteria.manual_check: Scan error logs for SQLITE_BUSY in last 30 min window

criteria.name: Master status query baseline captured
criteria.manual_check: Verify baseline snapshot logged with non-null values for all columns

steps: Do not start Phase 2
Identify failing criterion from gate table
Execute fail_action for that criterion
Re-run full gate evaluation after fix
Log re-evaluation attempt in incident log
Log GATE-H6 PASS with timestamp
Begin Phase 2 task T007
Update execution tracker GATE column for H6 to PASS

gates.name: Phase 2 Completion Gate (Hard Gate — Path B Blocker)
gates.description: The single most important gate. SLO-1 (zero duplicate chunk executions) is an absolute blocker for Path B. No Pandavs integration begins without this gate passing clean.

criteria.name: SLO-1: Zero duplicate chunk executions
criteria.sql_test: SELECT chunk_id, count(*) as cnt FROM chunk_queue WHERE status='COMPLETED' GROUP BY chunk_id HAVING count(*) > 1
criteria.notes: If this returns ANY rows, Phase 3 is BLOCKED regardless of all other criteria. Fix lease isolation first.

criteria.name: SLO-2: Outbox pending age < 2h
criteria.sql_test: SELECT max((julianday('now') - julianday(created_at)) * 24) AS oldest_h FROM sink_outbox WHERE synced_at IS NULL

criteria.name: Heartbeat reclaim working
criteria.manual_check: Inject stale lease; confirm auto-reclaim within 2x heartbeat interval; measure actual reclaim time

criteria.name: Backpressure signals active
criteria.manual_check: Inject 10001 pending records into outbox; confirm concurrency reduction logged within 1 heartbeat cycle

criteria.name: DB-derived metrics cron active (3 monotonic reports)
criteria.manual_check: Check 3 consecutive hourly reports; verify events_persisted and sink_synced_count are monotonically increasing; verify no file-system count used

criteria.name: Live sink writes confirmed
criteria.sql_test: SELECT count(*) FROM sink_outbox WHERE synced_at IS NOT NULL

steps: DO NOT START PHASE 3
If G2-C1 fails: immediately rollback grant_lease() to previous version; switch to file-list dispatch; audit chunk_queue for duplication source
For all other failures: fix failing criterion; re-run full gate evaluation
Log re-evaluation attempt with timestamp in incident log
Phase 3 start time shifts to new gate pass time
Log GATE-H18 PASS with timestamp
Begin Phase 3 task T013 (Pandavs connectivity validation)
Update execution tracker GATE column for H18 to PASS
Confirm: SQLite outbox sweep continues unchanged during Phase 3

gates.name: Path B Promotion Gate
gates.description: Evaluates whether Pandavs has proven sufficient integrity and operational stability over the 18h dual-write window to be promoted to primary sink. Failure means Path A indefinitely.

criteria.name: Hourly monotonicity 100% for 18h window
criteria.manual_check: Review all hourly reports from H18 to H36; both outbox_synced and pandavs_ingest columns must be monotonically non-decreasing

criteria.name: MTTR drill < 15 minutes
criteria.manual_check: T017 result: total time from Pandavs kill to restart + full catch-up to current outbox head

criteria.name: Rollback test < 5 min, 0 records lost
criteria.manual_check: T018 result: time from disable sink_target='pandavs' to Path A fully restored; verify outbox pending depth unchanged

criteria.name: Dead letter count = 0
criteria.sql_test: SELECT count(*) FROM sink_outbox WHERE status='DEAD_LETTER'

criteria.name: Zero unhandled Pandavs crashes in 18h window
criteria.manual_check: Scan Pandavs error log from Phase 3 start to gate evaluation time; count unhandled exceptions

steps: Disable sink_target='pandavs' in outbox sweep configuration
Verify SQLite outbox sweep resumes full throughput
Confirm zero records lost (outbox pending depth check)
Log failure root cause in incident log
Schedule new 36h Path B window after root cause resolved
Do not retry Path B promotion within same operational window
Log GATE-H36 PASS with timestamp
Promote Pandavs to primary sink
Disable SQLite outbox sweep for Pandavs path (keep SQLite as safety net for 1 additional 24h window)
Update execution tracker FINAL STATUS to PATH B PROMOTED
File post-implementation report referencing this tracker

tasks.name: Enable SQLite WAL mode
tasks.acceptance_test: PRAGMA journal_mode returns wal; concurrent read succeeds without SQLITE_BUSY

tasks.name: Initialize chunk_queue table
tasks.acceptance_test: 51 rows; all columns; idx_cq_status and idx_cq_lease_expires present

tasks.name: Implement grant_lease() with IMMEDIATE isolation
tasks.acceptance_test: 10 concurrent requests → 1 successful grant per chunk; no duplicate LEASED rows

tasks.name: Create sink_outbox and sink_sync_ledger tables
tasks.acceptance_test: UNIQUE(record_id) constraint present; duplicate insert raises constraint failed

tasks.name: Integrate outbox write into persistence_gateway
tasks.acceptance_test: Every chunk completion writes >=1 record to sink_outbox; WAL durability confirmed

tasks.name: Deploy master status query as monitoring baseline
tasks.acceptance_test: Query <100ms; baseline snapshot captured with non-null values

tasks.name: Implement outbox sweep (dry-run first)
tasks.acceptance_test: Dry-run: all pending records logged, zero sink writes, zero dropped records

tasks.name: Implement heartbeat + stale lease reclaim
tasks.acceptance_test: heartbeat() updates last_heartbeat_at; reclaim returns stale LEASED to PENDING within 2x interval

tasks.name: Deploy backpressure controller
tasks.acceptance_test: depth>10000 → 25% concurrency reduction logged; depth>50000 → lease halt; ORS signal within 1 cycle

tasks.name: Run SLO-1 + SLO-2 drills
tasks.acceptance_test: SLO-1: 0 duplicate chunk_ids in completed status; SLO-2: oldest outbox pending < 2h
tasks.critical_note: SLO-1 FAIL = mandatory stop and rollback. No exceptions.

tasks.name: Validate outbox age under load; enable live sink writes
tasks.acceptance_test: Oldest pending < 2h under full throughput; live writes enabled; first sync batch confirmed

tasks.name: Deploy hourly monotonic metrics cron
tasks.acceptance_test: 3 consecutive hourly reports monotonically increasing; no file-system counts

tasks.name: Validate Pandavs connectivity + schema compatibility
tasks.acceptance_test: Pandavs responds; schema compatible; runtime match confirmed; test write succeeds
tasks.abort_condition: Any check fails → abort Phase 3, maintain Path A indefinitely

tasks.name: Add Pandavs as parallel sink_target in sink_outbox
tasks.acceptance_test: Dual-write active; zero records dropped; SQLite sweep continues unmodified

tasks.name: Dual-write verification: row count comparison
tasks.acceptance_test: After 3h dual-write: delta = abs(pandavs_count - outbox_count) / outbox_count < 1%

tasks.name: DB-derived metrics with Pandavs comparison column
tasks.acceptance_test: Hourly report has both sinks; delta column computed; both columns monotonic

tasks.name: MTTR drill: kill Pandavs, measure restart + catch-up
Contingency validation: rollback test
tasks.acceptance_test: Disabling Pandavs sink_target restores Path A < 5 min; 0 records lost

hourly_report_schema.description: Required fields for every hourly progress report during the 36h execution window

chunks_done.sql: SELECT count(*) FROM chunk_queue WHERE status='COMPLETED'

coverage_pct.sql: SELECT round(count(CASE WHEN status='COMPLETED' THEN 1 END) * 100.0 / 51, 2) FROM chunk_queue

events_persisted.sql: SELECT sum(CASE WHEN record_count_produced IS NOT NULL THEN record_count_produced ELSE 0 END) FROM chunk_queue

sink_lag_h.sql: SELECT round(max((julianday('now') - julianday(created_at)) * 24), 2) FROM sink_outbox WHERE synced_at IS NULL
sink_lag_h.alert_action: Immediate blocker regardless of phase; reduce concurrency 50%; alert operator

eta_h.description: Estimated hours remaining to current phase gate or H36

blockers.description: Active blockers by task ID or description; empty list if none

anti_patterns.reason: No fallback if Pandavs fails with duplicates

metadata.reuse_instructions: Replace T001-T006 with lane-specific setup tasks for nuclei/enrichment lanes; retain Phase 2 backpressure and SLO patterns unchanged; Phase 3 gate criteria are pipeline-agnostic and remain valid
metadata.gate_evaluation_automation: All sql_test fields in gate criteria can be executed programmatically against scan_persistence.db; non-null result vs expected_value + comparison operator yields pass/fail; manual_check fields require human verification
metadata.tracker_template: execution_tracker_template.md — fill in during actual 36h rollout window
